zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk於大約1286年出生在德國薩辛德累斯頓時，她的父親Hartmann XI. Von Lobdaburg  Arnshaugk23歲，母親Adelheid von Arnshaugk25歲。她於1300年8月24日與Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I在德國薩可-可包格 安德 格塔格塔結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1359年8月22日在德國賀林根藍德可萊斯 格塔享年74歲，埋葬在德國賀林根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk于大约1286年出生在德国薩辛德累斯頓时，她的父亲Hartmann XI. Von Lobdaburg  Arnshaugk23岁，母亲Adelheid von Arnshaugk25岁。她于1300年8月24日与Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I在德国薩可-可包格 安德 格塔格塔结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1359年8月22日在德国賀林根藍德可萊斯 格塔享年74岁，埋葬在德国賀林根。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk was born about 1286, in Dresden, Saxony, Germany, her father, Hartmann XI. Von Lobdaburg  Arnshaugk, was 23 and her mother, Adelheid von Arnshaugk, was 25. She married Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I on 24 August 1300, in Gotha, Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 22 August 1359, in Gotha, Thuringia, Germany, at the age of 74, and was buried in Thuringia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk est née environ 1286, à Dresden, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Hartmann XI. Von Lobdaburg  Arnshaugk, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Arnshaugk, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I le 24 août 1300, à Gotha, Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 août 1359, à Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Thüringen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk um 1286 in Dresden, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hartmann XI. Von Lobdaburg  Arnshaugk 23 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Arnshaugk 25. Sie hat am 24. August 1300 in Gotha, Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, Deutschland Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. August 1359 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Deutschland und wurde in Thüringen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk è nata il circa 1286 nel Dresden, Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Hartmann XI. Von Lobdaburg  Arnshaugk, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Adelheid von Arnshaugk, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I il 24 agosto 1300, nel Gotha, Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 agosto 1359, nel Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Germania, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Thüringen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugkが約1286年にドイツサチセンドレスデンで生まれた時，父Hartmann XI. Von Lobdaburg  Arnshaugkは23歳，母Adelheid von Arnshaugkは25歳であった。1300年8月24日にドイツサクセ-コブルグ アンド ゴサゴサでFriedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1359年8月22日にドイツスuリンジェンランドクレイス ゴサで74歳で死去し，ドイツスuリンジェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk(이)가 대략 1286년 독일 작센 드레즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hartmann XI. Von Lobdaburg  Arnshaugk(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Arnshaugk(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1300년 8월 24일 독일 사세-컵르그 앤드 가스아 가스아에서 Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1359년 8월 22일 독일 스u링 랜드크레이스 가스아에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 스u링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk nasceu aproximadamente 1286, em Dresden, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Hartmann XI. Von Lobdaburg  Arnshaugk, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Arnshaugk, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I em 24 de agosto de 1300, em Gotha, Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1359, em Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Alemanha, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Thüringen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk родилась около 1286 г. в местности дресден, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Hartmann XI. Von Lobdaburg  Arnshaugk было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Arnshaugk, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I 24 августа 1300 г. в местности гота, саксе-кобург анд гота, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 августа 1359 г. в местности ландкрис гота, тuринген, Германия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности тuринген, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk nació aproximadamente 1286, en Dresden, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Hartmann XI. Von Lobdaburg  Arnshaugk, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Arnshaugk, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I el 24 de agosto de 1300, en Gotha, Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1359, en Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Alemania, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Thüringen, Alemania.
